steps.title: Add 3 mL, whole blood and...
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL, whole blood and mix by inverting 10 times.

steps.title: Incubate sample for 00:05:00 at Room temperature (15°C-25°C)
steps.instruction: Incubate sample for 00:05:00 at Room temperature (15°C-25°C). Invert once during the incubation.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 2000 x g, 25 °C, 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 2000 x g, 25 °C, 2 minutes .

steps.title: Pour off and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Pour off and discard supernatant. Leave approximately 200 µL of residual liquid and the white blood cell pellet.

steps.title: Vortex tube on high speed to...
steps.instruction: Vortex tube on high speed to resuspend pellet in the residual liquid.

steps.title: Add 3 mL, (1:1) Cell Lysis Solution
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL, (1:1) Cell Lysis Solution . Vortex on high speed for 00:00:10 . If clumps are visible in the tube, incubate sample in 37°C water bath until homogenous.

steps.title: Add 1 mL, (1:
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, (1:.333) of Protein Precipitation Solution . Vortex on high speed for 00:00:20 .

steps.title: Centrifuge sample at 2000 x g, 25 °C, 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge sample at 2000 x g, 25 °C, 5 minutes . If pellet does not tightly stick to the bottom of the tube, incubate on ice for 5 min and repeat centrifugation.

steps.title: Add 3 mL, (1:1) isopropanol into...
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL, (1:1) isopropanol into a clean 15 mL tube. Carefully pour the supernatant from step 11 into this tube. Be careful not to dislodge pellet during this step!

steps.title: Invert samples 50 times until DNA...
steps.instruction: Invert samples 50 times until DNA is visible as threads or a clump.

steps.title: Centrifuge tube at 2000 x g, °C, 3 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge tube at 2000 x g, °C, 3 minutes . Observe DNA as a small white pellet.

steps.title: Carefully pour/pipette off supernatant without disturbing the pellet
steps.instruction: Carefully pour/pipette off supernatant without disturbing the pellet. Drain excess drops of supernatant by inverting on a Kimwipe, while making sure that pellet remains in the tube.

steps.title: Add 3 mL, (1:1) 70% ethanol...
steps.instruction: Add 3 mL, (1:1) 70% ethanol and invert 3-5 times to wash the DNA pellet.

steps.title: Centrifuge pellet at 2000 x g, 25 °C, 1 minute
steps.instruction: Centrifuge pellet at 2000 x g, 25 °C, 1 minute .

steps.title: Carefully pour/pipette off ethanol without disturbing the pellet
steps.instruction: Carefully pour/pipette off ethanol without disturbing the pellet. Drain excess drops of ethanol by inverting on a Kimwipe, while making sure that pellet remains in the tube.

steps.title: Air dry the pellet for 00:01:00
steps.instruction: Air dry the pellet for 00:01:00 . Do not excessively air dry or pellet will be difficult to reconstitute. On the other hand, do not air dry the pellet for too short a period of time or residual ethanol will contaminate DNA!

steps.title: Add 250 µL, (1:100) DNA Hydration Solution
steps.instruction: Add 250 µL, (1:100) DNA Hydration Solution . Vortex on medium speed for 00:00:05 .

steps.title: Incubate DNA in 65 °C water...
steps.instruction: Incubate DNA in 65 °C water bath for 01:00:00 in order to dissolve DNA.

steps.title: Incubate at Room temperature (25°C) Overnight on rocker
steps.instruction: Incubate at Room temperature (25°C) Overnight on rocker.

steps.title: On the following day, DNA can...
steps.instruction: On the following day, DNA can be transferred to a 1.5 mL tube. Split volume in half to create two aliquots of DNA (DNA0-01 and 02).

steps.title: Aliquot 3 µL, (40x dilution) DNA into a 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 3 µL, (40x dilution) DNA into a 1.5 mL tube for Cary concentration assay. (Store in -20 °C if not being assay immediately.)

steps.title: Aliquot 1
steps.instruction: Aliquot 1.5 µL, DNA into a PCR tube for .7% agarose gel electrophoresis to confirm presence and size of DNA. (Store in -20 °C if not being assay immediately.)

steps.title: Preheat water bath to 37 °C...
steps.instruction: Preheat water bath to 37 °C before removing whole blood samples from -80°C freezer.

steps.title: Thaw whole blood samples by gently...
steps.instruction: Thaw whole blood samples by gently agitating sample in the 37°C water bath. Once thawed, reset water bath to 65 °C for last step in protocol.

steps.title: Add 9 mL, (1:3) RBC Lysis...
steps.instruction: Add 9 mL, (1:3) RBC Lysis Solution to a 15 mL centrifuge tube.
